title: Multiplying with Five

segments.narration: What happens when we add five, five times? Let's find out!
Multiplication is like repeated addition, and five times five equals twenty-five.
Now, can you create your own array to show five groups of five?
Remember, five times five is twenty-five, and arrays help us see multiplication!

teacherNotes: Encourage students to visualize arrays as a way to better understand multiplication.
